title: Squish
description: Keep your mobs babies forever! In a sugary way!
body:
![Description Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/061075dac7ea4774504fcd99d877301922d87334.png)

# 🐾Squish **Keep your mobs babies forever, in a sugary way!** # 📝About

**Squish** is a small but magical addition to your world, built around one simple idea: The cutest things deserve to stay cute forever. With **Squish**, every tameable or passive mob remains in its adorable baby form **permanently**! No timers, no growth, just pure small vibes. 🐣💗 But **Squish** isn’t just about tiny friends. It also introduces a sweet new layer of progression through nostalgic crafting methods: **🍬 Candy Making:** Create charming, flavorful sweets using systems Minecraft players rarely touch anymore : Campfire cooking, and brewing. ✨ From **everlasting** baby mobs to tasty candies crafted the old-fashioned way, **Squish** brings a gentle, playful spark back into Minecraft! Perfect for cozy players, modpack creators, or anyone who wants their world to feel a bit softer. (PS: Don't eat the Candy, you might feel a little sick 😉) ### Credits **Shoutout to [gooberexe](https://bsky.app/profile/gooberexe.bsky.social) for making the pixel art for the candy!** **Shoutout to [Mama Native](https://www.twitch.tv/mama_native) and Squish for this beautiful mod idea <3**
